CustomObject.description: Catalog of normalized CE codes derived from NEPATEC v2.0 (292 unique codes, top 40 seeded here). Used by NEPA_CE_Screener flow and CLM clause selection logic to look up authority citation, description, and threshold constraints for a given CE code.
CustomObject.label: NEPA CE Code

fields.description: Normalized CE code string, e.g. B1.3, 516 DM 11.9, Energy Policy Act 2005 Sec.390(b)(4).
fields.label: CE Code

fields.description: CFR or statutory authority citation, e.g. DOE 10 CFR 1021 App.B §B1.3.
fields.label: Authority / CFR Citation

fields.description: Plain-language description of the action types this CE covers. Used in CLM clause selection and applicant-facing portal messaging.
fields.label: Plain Language Description

fields.description: Primary agency for this code: DOE, BLM, USFS, DOD, EPA, or ALL.
fields.label: Agency

fields.description: If true, this CE applies only to indoor facility operations (e.g. B3.6). Outdoor or field activities do not qualify.
fields.label: Indoor Only

fields.description: Maximum surface disturbance in acres. 0 = no limit. Key value: 5.0 for Energy Policy Act Sec.390(b)(1).
fields.label: Acreage Threshold

fields.description: If true, GIS resource overlay must be run and extraordinary circumstances must be clear before this CE can be confirmed.
fields.label: Requires GIS Review

fields.description: If true, this record represents a compound CE authority (e.g. A9 + B3.6). The CE is valid under multiple independent authorities simultaneously.
fields.label: Is Multi-Code

fields.description: Frequency count from NEPATEC v2.0 corpus. Higher counts indicate more established agency practice for this code.
fields.label: NEPATEC Record Count

fields.description: Inactive codes are excluded from screener and CLM selection logic. SubscriberControlled so agencies can enable/disable codes without a package update.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: Date this record version becomes effective. Flows compare inp_EvaluationDate (= nepa_start_date__c on the IA) against this: only records where Effective_Start_Date__c IS NULL OR <= EvaluationDate are returned. Null = effective from the beginning of time.
fields.label: Effective Start Date

fields.description: Date after which this record version is no longer effective (EO 14270 sunset compliance). Flows filter: Sunset_Date__c IS NULL OR >= EvaluationDate. Null = no sunset.
fields.label: Sunset Date
